hooks.command: if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '"command"\s*:\s*"[^"]*\b(npm (install|i |ci|run|exec|test|start)|npx |pnpm (install|run|add|exec|test|start|i )|pnpx |yarn (install|add|run|start))'; then echo 'Use bun instead of npm/pnpm/yarn. This project uses bun as its package manager.' >&2; exit 2; fi
